synopsis: For young Padawan Sav Malagan, [sic] joining the ranks of the noble Jedi Order has been all she’s ever wanted. But a chance encounter with a crew of eccentric misfits makes her question everything she’s taken for granted in her life. Trapped aboard the ship of infamous space pirate Maz Kanata, will Save [sic] ever be able to rejoin the Jedi? And if she spends much long with Maz and her crew, will she even want to?
title: The High Republic: The Blade
